overall.description: First-person gameplay footage in a snowy mountainous environment. The player character walks through snow-covered terrain, encounters a large woolly rhino-like creature that passes by, and approaches a steaming geothermal hot spring surrounded by snow-laden pine trees and rocky cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain slope with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up a snow-covered slope alongside a rocky cliff face

entered.detail: large gray rock formation with snow patches on the left side of the path
snowy terrain with patches of exposed grass and footprints
tall evergreen trees with heavy snow on branches visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy mountain path with a rocky cliff face on the left. The camera moves forward and slightly uphill through snow-covered terrain, approaching a stand of snow-laden pine trees in the distance under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path with wildlife encounter

events.description: large woolly rhino-like creature appears in the snowy path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path as a large creature becomes visible ahead

notable_agents.action: large furry rhino-like creature standing in the path ahead, facing the camera

entered.detail: large furry brown creature with horns resembling a woolly rhino standing on the snow

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, a large woolly rhino creature appears in the center of the snowy path ahead. The rocky cliff falls behind to the left while pine trees now line both sides of the widening mountain trail. The creature stands facing the camera as the distance between them closes.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy valley leading to geothermal area

events.description: woolly rhino creature charges past the camera to the right and exits view

agents.ego_description: moving past the creature and continuing down the slope toward a steam-filled valley

notable_agents.action: creature running past the camera to the right, kicking up snow

entered.detail: white steam rising from a geothermal hot spring visible in the valley ahead
circular pool of water surrounded by snow with steam rising from the surface
steep cliff face forming the back of the valley with snow patches

segments.scene_description: The creature charges past the camera to the right and disappears behind. The camera continues forward into a snowy valley where a steaming geothermal hot spring becomes visible in the distance, surrounded by rocky mountain walls and scattered pine trees.

agents.ego_description: approaching the steaming hot spring pool through snow-covered terrain

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the geothermal hot spring, with the pool now prominent in the center of the frame. Steam rises thickly from the water's surface, and the surrounding snow-covered ground shows patches of exposed earth near the water's edge. The rocky mountain walls loom in the background.

agents.ego_description: slowing approach to the edge of the hot spring, observing the steaming water

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the edge of the hot spring pool, with the steaming water now filling the center of the view. The clear blue water contrasts with the surrounding white snow, while steam continues to rise steadily from the geothermal surface. The scene is framed by distant snow-covered mountains and scattered pine trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey through a snowy mountain pass that culminates at a steaming geothermal hot spring. It begins on a rocky uphill path under a clear blue sky, moving toward a distant stand of snow-laden pine trees. As the camera advances and the trail widens, a large woolly rhino appears in the center of the path before charging past to the right and disappearing from view. The scene then opens into a snowy valley where the camera approaches a geothermal pool, with thick steam rising from the water and patches of exposed earth appearing through the snow. Finally, the camera reaches the water's edge, where the clear blue of the hot spring contrasts with the surrounding white terrain and looming rocky mountain walls.
